body: Bank Indonesia maintained its BI rate at 6%, deposit facility rate at 5.25%, and lending facility at 6.75% to reinforce the stability of the rupiah exchange rate amidst immense uncertainty in the global economy. The rupiah exchange rate weakened 1.37% in December 2024, and BI will optimize its monetary instruments to attract short-term portfolio investments and bolster the rupiah.
title: Bank Indonesia holds interest rates steady to stabilize rupiah exchange rate amid global economic uncertainty.
